positive: A detailed, stylized depiction of a whimsical forest creature—a fox hybrid with iridescent blue fur and glowing amber eyes. The creature is sitting in a dramatic, centered pose among oversized, glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and fern leaves. The scene should use strong, clean silhouettes against a deep twilight backdrop, utilizing high-contrast neon accents (electric blue, emerald green, deep violet) for a dreamy, mystical, and vibrant aesthetic. The composition must be perfectly centered and isolated on a clean background suitable for textile printing, with crisp, graphic lines and a sticker-like quality. Art Nouveau style influence, digital illustration, highly detailed ink lines, octane render, pop art poster style.
